meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio trap by building high-value SaaS pricing tools. Master rapid development with Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your clients.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth—you don't need years of client work to prove value. By building a high-fidelity SaaS pricing calculator using Antigravity and Claude Code, you demonstrate architectural expertise, UI precision, and business logic maturity, turning a technical demo into a compelling, high-converting client asset.
content.intro:
The cold silence of a blank portfolio is the greatest barrier to your first five-figure contract. You are stuck in a loop: you need clients to build work, but you need work to land clients. It is a classic engineering paradox that leaves talented developers spinning their wheels while competitors with less skill but better 'shipping velocity' steal the market share.

Relief arrives when you stop waiting for permission and start building your own proof. By engineering a professional-grade SaaS pricing module, you showcase your ability to handle complex state management and business logic. This isn't just code; it's a strategic asset that proves you understand the bottom line of the businesses you intend to serve.

steps.title: Define the Value Architecture
steps.description: Establish the pricing tiers and logic flow. We focus on a tiered subscription model (Basic, Pro, Enterprise) with dynamic variable costs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust pricing schema for a SaaS platform. Include three tiers with dynamic feature sets and a monthly/annual toggle logic.

steps.title: Bootstrap the UI Component
steps.description: Build a responsive, high-converting pricing card layout that emphasizes the 'Pro' tier using a modern tech stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, Tailwind-based pricing component with a hover effect on the recommended tier and a toggle switch for yearly discounts.

steps.title: Implement Business Logic
steps.description: Ensure the math behind the annual vs. monthly discount is bulletproof and reflected in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript function that calculates annual savings and updates the pricing state based on a boolean toggle.

steps.title: Integrate Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add subtle psychological triggers, such as 'Most Popular' badges and clear CTA buttons that lead to a mock checkout.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a 'Most Popular' badge to the Pro tier and ensure the button component accepts an 'onSelect' callback function.

steps.title: Performance Optimization
steps.description: Audit the component for accessibility and load speed to ensure it meets enterprise-grade standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the pricing component for accessibility (a11y) compliance and optimize the render cycle to prevent unnecessary re-renders.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Contact Us' fallback for Enterprise tiers; it signals you understand B2B enterprise sales cycles.
Use CSS Grid for the pricing cards to ensure they stack gracefully on mobile without media query bloat.
Hardcode the 'discount percentage' as a constant so you can change it globally for A/B testing later.
Add a small 'Price Transparency' tooltip to build trust with users who fear hidden SaaS fees.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your pricing logic; showing a '100% test coverage' badge on your portfolio is a massive trust signal.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing component to Vercel, link it to a live demo landing page, and add the repository link to your LinkedIn and GitHub pinned projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the 'no portfolio' excuse hold your freelance career back. You now have the blueprint to build high-value assets that sell your services for you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
